#define se second

#define mp make_pair

#define all(t) t.begin(), t.end()

#define print2(x, y) cout << (x) << " " << (y) << "\n"

#define print3(x, y, z) cout << (x) << " " << (y) << " " << (z) << "\n"

#define printv(x) for (auto e : x) { cout << e << " "; } cout << "\n";

#define printvv(x) for (auto e : x) { for (auto ee : e) { cout << ee << " "; } cout << "\n"; }

#define printvvp(x) for (auto e : x) { for (auto ee : e) { for (auto eee : ee) { cout << eee << " "; } cout << "\n"; } cout << "\n"; }

#define debug2(x, y) cerr << #x << ": " << x << ", " << #y << ": " << y << '\n'

#define debug3(x, y, z) cerr << #x << ": " << x << ", " << #y << ": " << y << ", " << #z << ": " << z << '\n'

#define dbg(...) cerr << #__VA_ARGS__<< ": " << (__VA_ARGS__) << '\n'

#define no cout << "No" << '\n'

#define YES cout << "YES" << '\n'

#define NO cout << "NO" << '\n'

#define all_p(x) x.begin(), x.end(), less<void>()

#define all_r(x) x.begin(), x.end(), greater<void>()

#define linf (ll)1e18

#define find_pred(g, x) find_if(all(g), [&](auto &i) { return i > x; })

#define find_succ(g, x) find_if(all(g), [&](auto &i) { return i < x; })
